title: Backend Developer Vacancy at LG Soft India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at LG Soft India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at LG Soft India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About LG Soft India:
LG Soft India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India!
